title: Assay Specimen Quality Failure Mode Checklist v0

checklist_rows.trigger: Residual-disease signal is reported without assay family, platform, analysis method, or with vague MRD wording only.
Residual-disease language lacks source-stated cutoff, detection-status, sensitivity, limit of detection, lower limit of quantification, or response criteria.
Marrow aspirate, blood, serum, tissue, trephine, or imaging context is absent or specimen adequacy, hemodilution, acquisition quality, processing boundary, or sampling limitation is not represented.
Timing relative to therapy, response assessment, follow-up, or paired modality assessment is absent, source-defined only in incompatible buckets, or not aligned enough for comparison.
Blood mass spectrometry, PET-CT, spatial, microenvironment, or marrow MRD context is present without the paired modality context needed for the claimed comparison.
Imaging residual-disease language appears without imaging modality, criteria, timing, read boundary, or paired marrow-method context.
Spatial transcriptomics, trephine, niche, microenvironment, or biopsy context appears without site, specimen method, sampling limitation, processing boundary, or cohort scope.
PRO, frailty, toxicity, function, quality-of-life, or missingness context is treated as tumor residual disease or used to infer residual-disease state.
Request requires real report review, lab-validity judgment, image read, biopsy interpretation, clinician review, private record, or exact person-linked timing.
A tool, prompt, table, or user request tries to collapse one modality result into a global disease state, response state, endpoint state, or advice output.

failure_rules.rule: Method, specimen, threshold, timing, paired-modality context, and source status must be represented before comparison.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark the specific missing quality state and block comparison language.

failure_rules.rule: Missing assay, specimen, timing, imaging, or spatial context cannot imply absence of disease or absence of disagreement.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Preserve missingness and require a limitation note.

failure_rules.rule: Response-depth or MRD-depth language requires source-stated threshold, detection limit, or criteria.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark threshold_needed and block cure, prognosis, endpoint interpretation, and comparison.

failure_rules.rule: Discordance language requires source-defined paired modality timing or an explicit missing-timing state.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark timepoint_alignment_needed or paired_modality_context_needed and block patient meaning.

failure_rules.rule: Imaging, biopsy, spatial, or microenvironment context may be source-scoped only.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Preserve method and sampling context; block image, biopsy, site, resistance, prognosis, and treatment interpretation.

failure_rules.rule: PRO, frailty, toxicity, function, and burden context cannot be converted into tumor residual-disease state.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark host_context_not_residual_disease and keep host context separate.

failure_rules.rule: Real reports, scans, biopsies, raw values, private records, and lab-validity questions must leave the public path.
failure_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark private_lab_or_clinical_review_needed and refuse public interpretation.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic MRD-negative source context has method and specimen but no threshold or detection limit.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark threshold_needed; no deep response, cure, prognosis, endpoint interpretation, or comparison.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic marrow MRD context lacks adequacy, hemodilution, or specimen-quality state.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark specimen_quality_needed; no cross-modality comparison or response call.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic PET-CT and marrow MRD context are both source-scoped but assessment timing is not aligned.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark timepoint_alignment_needed; no discordance interpretation or monitoring guidance.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic blood mass spectrometry residual-disease context has no paired marrow context.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark paired_modality_context_needed; no substitution for marrow MRD and no response call.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic spatial marrow context has method family but no site, specimen method, or sampling limitation.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark spatial_sampling_context_needed; no site-specific state or resistance interpretation.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Prompt requests quality review of a real lab report, imaging report, biopsy report, or private record.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark private_lab_or_clinical_review_needed; refuse public processing and route to private review gates.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Prompt converts one residual-disease modality into a global disease-state or advice output.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark modality_collapse_blocked; refuse endpoint interpretation, prognosis, monitoring, treatment, ranking, and decisions.

handoff.summary: Public failure-mode checklist complete; future synthetic fixtures should pressure method, threshold, specimen, timing, paired-modality, imaging, spatial, host-context, private-review, and modality-collapse refusal states.
